summary: Current-main verification confirms the representative PR's single shared Nested-lane premise no longer matches shipped behavior: sessions_send, A2A paths, and generic nested agent steps resolve per-target nested session lanes. Security-sensitive closed refs are routed only for central security awareness; the non-security representative stays closed as already not reproducible on current main.
